metadata.description: Agent-to-agent messaging for AI coding agents.

plugins.name: agent-comm
plugins.description: Agent-to-agent messaging for AI coding agents. Sessions, direct/broadcast/channel messages, shared state (TTL + atomic CAS), threaded replies, real-time WebSocket feed, and a local dashboard on :3421. Ships a file-coordination hook that gives parallel agents automatic per-file locking on shared edits.
